programme_hints: Visualisation shows mixed-use canal-side development: residential apartments with balconies, active ground-floor retail/café uses, tree-lined public promenade along a canal, suggesting programme combining housing, commercial plinth, and high-quality public realm.
urban_intent_passages: Visualisation of a canal-side streetscape in Nieuw Legmeer showing residential buildings with balconies, ground-floor active plinths/retail, tree-lined promenades, cyclists and pedestrians alongside a waterway, suggesting an urban neighbourhood with mixed-use ground floors, green public space, and human-scale canal-front design.
